directive: Governance -> Engineering Execution Directive: Phase V.2 Gate Resolution & Mandatory Stress Validation

ownership_contract.variant_side: Fleet A varies by FR x MB
ownership_contract.mirror_companion: For each case, mirrored run swaps variant to Fleet B
ownership_contract.determinism: Each primary case run twice with digest equality

jitter_metric_definition: Jitter count = per-tick number of alive units (alive on both consecutive pre-combat snapshots) whose assigned target id changes; None<->target and target->target both counted.
pocket_metric_definition: Pocket lifetime = consecutive OUTLIER streak length (ticks), OUTLIER if r > max(R_p90 + min_unit_spacing, eta*R_rms), eta=1.8.
